samples.formatted:
Baked Macaroni and Cheese

Ingredients:
- yeast
- milk
- sugar
- salt
- egg
- flour
- butter

Instructions:
1. Dissolve yeast, milk
2. Add sugar, salt and egg
3. Stir in flour
4. Knead into a moderately warm place in
5. warm place (85)
6. Cover and let rise in doubled
7. Punch up; place in butter
8. Cover in greased bowl
9. Let rise in size (about
10. 20 to
11. Bake at 400 for
12. 20 minutes or until brown or until done

samples.title: Baked Macaroni and Cheese
steps: Melt butter over medium-high heat over medium heat
Stir in flour; cook and stir until smooth
Add egg; cook; remove from heat
Season to taste, stirring constantly, until mixture begins thicken
Bake in a 350 oven for 30 minutes
Sprinkle 1/2 cup cheese on top of casserole
Return to oven and bake for 10 minutes
samples.formatted:
Baked Macaroni and Cheese

Ingredients:
- butter
- flour
- eggs
- salt

Instructions:
1. Melt butter over medium-high heat over medium heat
2. Stir in flour; cook and stir until smooth
3. Gradually from heat
4. Add egg; cook; remove from heat
5. Season to taste, stirring constantly, until mixture begins thicken
6. Remove from heat
7. Stir, then add cheese
8. Place in a 2-quart casserole
9. Cover
10. Cover and let stand 5 minutes
11. Stir in macaroni
12. Pour into baking dish
13. Bake in a 350 oven for 30 minutes
14. Sprinkle 1/2 cup cheese on top of casserole
15. Return to oven and bake for 10 minutes
16. Bake, covered, 5 minutes

samples.title: Baked Macaroni and Cheese
steps: Cook macaroni according to package directions
In a large saucepan melt butter
Stir in flour, salt and pepper, stirring constantly, until mixture thickens
Stir until cheese is melted melted, then add sauce
Add macaroni and cheese. <NEXT dishINSTR> Pour into large casserole dish
samples.formatted:
Baked Macaroni and Cheese

Ingredients:
- macaroni
- butter
- flour
- hot milk
- salt
- pepper
- cheese

Instructions:
1. Cook macaroni according to package directions
2. Drain
3. In a large saucepan melt butter
4. Stir in flour, salt and pepper, stirring constantly, until mixture thickens
5. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly
6. Stir until cheese is melted melted, then add sauce
7. Add macaroni and cheese. <NEXT dishINSTR> Pour into large casserole dish
8. Bake at 375 for 30 minutes
9. Makes 4 servings

samples.formatted:
Baked Macaroni and Cheese

Ingredients:
- macaroni
- butter
- flour
- milk
- salt
- pepper
- cheese

Instructions:
1. Melt butter in a sauce pan pan
2. Add flour flour and stir to smooth and smooth. Add milk and cheese. <NEXT_ cheese> Stir until cheese is melted
3. Blend macaroni with cheese in smooth
4. Salt
5. Pour into casserole dish and top with grated cheese
6. Bake for 30 minutes
7. Yield:
8. 8 servings
